recommendation_to_operator_and_lead: APPARATUS BUG: the launcher double-spawned MISSION-006 (095811 @09:58:11 then 095916 @09:59:16). Add a per-mission singleton guard before spawning a manager: e.g. atomically create/lock orchestration/state/M-006-state.json (or a M-006.lock) and refuse to spawn if a live manager already holds it.
